rows.title: Explains Foundational Educational Theories
rows.statement: The learner explains foundational educational theories and their historical significance in the classroom.

rows.title: Examines Foundational Educational Theories
rows.statement: The learner examines foundational educational theories in respect to learner growth and development.

rows.title: Applies Human Development and Learning Science
rows.statement: The learner applies human development and learning science to educational practices.

rows.title: Evaluates Theories of Understanding and Knowledge Retention
rows.statement: The learner evaluates theories of understanding and knowledge retention in the contemporary classroom.

rows.title: Differentiates between Communication, Collaboration, and Consultation
rows.statement: The learner differentiates between communication, collaboration, and consultation in learning environments.

rows.title: Fosters Collaborative Partnerships
rows.statement: The learner collaborates with educators, families, and community stakeholders to build productive partnerships that support student learning, promote equity, and address diverse learning needs.

rows.title: Facilitates Professional Collaboration
rows.statement: The learner facilitates collaboration among colleagues by leading team-based efforts, such as professional learning communities and instructional planning, to address shared goals and improve teaching and learning outcomes.

rows.title: Leads Professional Learning through Consultation
rows.statement: The learner applies consultation strategies to design and lead professional learning opportunities that address identified instructional needs and support continuous improvement in learning environments.

rows.title: Evaluates Educational Technology and Compliance
rows.statement: The learner evaluates ethical, legal, and professional standards related to the use of educational technology, including data privacy, intellectual property, accessibility, and digital citizenship, to ensure responsible and compliant instructional practices.

rows.title: Selects Educational Technologies through Analysis
rows.statement: The learner selects educational technologies based on instructional needs across various learning models, including blended and online learning environments, while evaluating emerging technologies for their potential to enhance teaching, learning, and student engagement.

rows.title: Implements Educational Technology
rows.statement: The learner implements educational technologies in learning environments using ethical practices and professional standards, ensuring appropriate data use, accessibility, and equitable engagement while monitoring and adjusting practices based on learner needs and outcomes.

rows.title: Analyzes Educational Research Studies
rows.statement: The learner analyzes educational research studies by interpreting and analyzing data, identifying key findings, and examining the alignment between research questions, methodologies, and conclusions to determine implications for data-informed instructional practices.

rows.title: Interprets Educational Research and Data in Learning Environments
rows.statement: The learner interprets foundational concepts of educational research and data literacy to read, interpret, and evaluate research findings to inform instructional decisions that improve learning, instruction, curriculum, and training across diverse learning environments.

rows.title: Applies Educational Research Principles
rows.statement: The learner applies educational research principles by formulating a problem statement and research questions, locating and selecting relevant scholarly sources using academic research tools, and aligning appropriate research methodologies to the identified topic.

rows.title: Examines the Role of Instructional Leadership
rows.statement: The learner examines the responsibilities and impact of instructional leadership, including fostering collaborative cultures, supporting educator development, and promoting equitable learning outcomes.

rows.title: Designs Instructional Leadership Plans
rows.statement: The learner designs strategic instructional leadership plans that incorporate evidence-based practices, professional learning structures, and measurable goals to support educator development and student success.

rows.title: Implements Instructional Leadership Practices
rows.statement: The learner implements instructional leadership strategies that enhance instruction and student achievement through coaching, feedback, and data-driven decision-making.

rows.title: Creates Equitable Learning Experiences
rows.statement: The learner creates equitable learning experiences that promote achievement for all students.

rows.title: Leads Educators in Evaluating Curriculum and Implementing Diverse Instructional Practices
rows.statement: The learner leads educators in evaluating curriculum and implementing culturally and linguistically diverse instructional practices.

rows.title: Advocates for Equitable Systems
rows.statement: The learner advocates for equitable systems that support multilingual and neurodiverse students within evidence-based standards and frameworks.

rows.title: Evaluates Curriculum
rows.statement: The learner evaluates curriculum through the application of theories, principles, and models.

rows.title: Analyzes Scope and Sequence of a Curriculum Map
rows.statement: The learner analyzes the scope and sequence of a curriculum map against given standards.

rows.title: Aligns a Curriculum to Evolving Needs
rows.statement: The learner aligns a curriculum to the evolving needs of students.

rows.title: Supports the Implementation of Curriculum
rows.statement: The learner applies research based principles of implementation science to support stakeholders in implementing curriculum for a diverse group of students.

rows.title: Examines Instructional Models
rows.statement: The learner examines the application of instructional models against the needs of varied learning environments.

rows.title: Differentiates Instruction
rows.statement: The learner differentiates instruction through the modification of content, process, and product.

rows.title: Incorporates Evidence-Based Research into Instruction
rows.statement: The learner incorporates evidence-based research into instruction.

rows.title: Provides Instructional Feedback
rows.statement: The learner provides feedback to enhance the implementation of instruction.

rows.title: Explains Foundational Principles of Assessment
rows.statement: The learner explains the foundational principles of assessment, including forms of assessment.

rows.title: Analyzes the Validity, Risk, and Reliability of an Assessment
rows.statement: The learner analyzes the validity, risk, and reliability of an assessment through assessment data analysis.

rows.title: Analyzes Assessment Data for Instruction
rows.statement: The learner analyzes data to adjust instruction, enhance student achievement, and inform feedback.

rows.title: Designs an Assessment System
rows.statement: The learner designs a balanced and comprehensive assessment system that aligns to standards and measures progress toward learning goals.

rows.title: Preparing to do Research
rows.statement: The learner produces a research proposal that satisfies and cites specific laws, policies, codes of ethics, professional standards, and other applicable requirements to advance student learning.

rows.title: Capstone Literature Review and Methodology
rows.statement: The learner writes a scholarly literature review and research methodology chapters that align with the approved research proposal.

rows.title: Conducts the Research Process
rows.statement: The learner conducts their research project and collects data consistent with their proposal.

rows.title: Results and Conclusions
rows.statement: The learner writes the results and conclusions chapters to align with the approved research proposal after collecting and analyzing the data for the research project or study.

rows.title: Presenting the Capstone
rows.statement: The learner presents a completed capstone supported by a narrated multimedia presentation that could potentially contribute to knowledge in the field of curriculum and instruction.
